title: taraxacum biforme
intro: Taraxacum biforme is a species of dandelion, a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum biforme include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum biforme can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and detoxification.
